delivery.raw: 主にオンライン同期型（全開講回数の過半数）、一部対面

summary: This course is designed for students who intend to be nursing staffs. They are designated to understand the importance of practical English for nursing staffs and learn how to communicate in English at clinical settings of treating foreign people.
aims: They are designated to understand the importance of practical English for nursing staffs and learn how to communicate in English at clinical settings of treating foreign people.
goals: Students recognize and converse in the clinical settings as a nurse at the end of this course.
Students demonstrate knowledge of medical terminology.
Students demonstrate knowledge to some clinical symptoms in English.

plan.text:
First Visit to a Hospital (来院),
How to Fill in a Registration Form (初診受付)

Let's Ask about Mr. Brown's Daily Activities (生活習慣を聞く),
Mr. Brown's Symptoms (問診（1）)

Medical Checkup 1 (脈拍，血圧，体重の測定),
Medical Checkup 2 (採血，採尿)

Mr. Brown's Diagnosis (診断（1）),
Mr. Anderson's Symptoms (問診（2）)

Let's Ask More about Mr. Anderson's Symptoms (症状をより詳しく聞く),
Explaining Blood Test Results (診断（2）)

How to Take Medicine (薬の説明),
Mrs. Johnson Feels Dizzy (問診（3）)

An MRI Test (MRIを受ける)
Recommending an Operation (手術を勧める),
Post-operative Care (術後のコミュニケーション)

textbooks: [必携] First Aid! English for Nursing 看護英語への総合アプローチ: AKIHIKO HIGUCHI, JOHN TREMARCO, NINSEIDO
prereq: 高校で学修した英語の知識が必要です．
prep: 提示されたテキスト（Unit）の予習と復習が必要です．

extra.label: この授業で身につける「10+1の能力」
extra.text:
専門分野に関する知識
語学に関するリテラシー
表現力

extra.label: 成績評価に関する補足
extra.text: It will have an examination after the end of all classes (100%).

extra.label: 教員の実務経験の有無
